scripts.build: vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs && esbuild prisma/seed.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/seed.cjs
scripts.start:local: npm run db:push && npm run db:seed && node dist/server.cjs
scripts.db:migrate:verify: prisma migrate deploy && prisma migrate status && prisma migrate diff --from-url "$DATABASE_URL" --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --exit-code
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run audit
scripts.test: npm run test:data-safety && npm run test:oauth && npm run test:csrf
scripts.test:data-safety: TMPDIR=/tmp tsx tests/imports_route_safety.ts && TMPDIR=/tmp tsx tests/documents_route_safety.ts
scripts.test:api: npm run test:api:auth && npm run test:api:documents && npm run test:api:operations && npm run test:api:flags && npm run test:api:observability
